series.title: Vikings 2026!
series.shortDescription: A municipal integration department processes displaced Vikings from the 9th century into modern New York life.
series.longDescription: When a longship crew from the 9th century is temporally displaced into present-day New York, they are routed into a city integration office that runs on forms, hearings, and impossible waitlists. Every episode turns cultural translation, housing policy, identity paperwork, and lonely reinvention into workplace comedy where small acts of humanity beat rigid systems.
series.audiencePromise: Warm, character-driven workplace comedy where bureaucratic pressure creates absurd stakes and genuine belonging.
series.coreConflict: Humanity vs paperwork; belonging vs assimilation.
series.worldPremise: Modern municipal systems collide with Norse values, rituals, and kinship structures inside a high-pressure city office.
series.seriesEngine: Each chapter follows staff and Viking newcomers navigating forms, services, and social norms, with every solved task uncovering a deeper emotional or civic conflict.

series.title: Stardust Station
series.tagline: Feelings break systems faster than meteor storms.
series.shortDescription: A space station crew keeps operations running while ordinary interpersonal friction escalates into cosmic-scale incidents.
series.longDescription: Stardust Station is a bustling orbital workplace where every emotional misunderstanding can trigger a literal systems cascade. Docking assignments, life-support routines, and transit schedules are cleanly designed; the humans and aliens running them are not. The result is a bright, weird, sincere ensemble comedy where technical order collides with social chaos.
series.audiencePromise: Fast, funny workplace stories with ensemble chemistry, heart, and escalating sci-fi consequences.
series.coreConflict: Emotional and social mess becomes operational chaos through the station's interconnected systems.
series.worldPremise: A pristine station UI and protocol-heavy operations environment sits on top of a wildly unpredictable community.
series.seriesEngine: Each release starts with a normal station task and spirals as relationships, stress, and cosmic anomalies turn minor issues into major incidents.

series.title: Azure Reach
series.shortDescription: A modern marine park team protects animal welfare while juggling branding promises, operations pressure, and daily workplace chaos.
series.longDescription: Azure Reach follows caretakers, technicians, guest-services staff, and managers at a premium marine park where the public expects effortless magic. Behind the scenes, life-support systems, maintenance schedules, and staffing gaps create constant friction. Animals are treasured and never put at risk; the comedy comes from humans trying to keep standards high while systems and personalities collide.
series.audiencePromise: Grounded, funny workplace storytelling with emotional stakes, operational detail, and a hard line on animal care.
series.coreConflict: Spotless guest-facing magic vs messy behind-the-scenes systems.
series.worldPremise: A polished aquarium brand depends on complex mechanical infrastructure and teams with competing priorities.
series.seriesEngine: Every story begins with a guest or operations objective and reveals layered challenges across animal care, technical systems, and workplace dynamics.

series.title: Sunforge Outlaw
series.tagline: Debt, heat, and pursuit at the edge of civilization.
series.shortDescription: An outlaw fights to survive a brutal frontier where debt, heat, and relentless pursuit shape every decision.
series.longDescription: Sunforge Outlaw tracks desperate travelers, enforcers, and opportunists across a sun-burned frontier built on scarce water, volatile fuel, and violent leverage. Every route carries a cost, every safe harbor carries a hidden debt, and every choice narrows the path forward. The series pairs cinematic action with character-driven consequences in a world of dust, metal, and heat haze.
series.audiencePromise: High-tension frontier storytelling with visceral atmosphere, moral pressure, and hard-won character choices.
series.coreConflict: Survival and dignity under crushing debt, territorial violence, and constant pursuit.
series.worldPremise: Outlaw corridors and settlement routes run through dangerous sunscorched territory where resources dictate power.
series.seriesEngine: Each chapter follows a job, chase, or escape that forces characters to trade safety, loyalty, and principle under escalating pressure.
